name: Basic instructions
description: Canonical repository rules for all agents and contributors

# ⚠️ MANDATORY: Initial Orientation Workflow

**BEFORE starting ANY work, you MUST complete the orientation workflow in [docs/workflows/orientation.md](../docs/workflows/orientation.md).**

This workflow ensures you:
1. Understand the codebase architecture
2. Know the project rules
3. Locate the correct module for your changes
4. Find relevant existing code and tests

**Do not proceed with implementation until you have completed all steps in the orientation workflow.**

---
